data.body: Investigation complete. ROOT_CAUSE: overlap check in record-review.sh is set-level (fires when ANY finding overlaps diff) not per-finding — hallucinated out-of-diff findings pass through when mixed with in-diff findings. Confidence: high. Fix (both): (1) Change record-review.sh to per-finding strip (filter findings whose file is not in CHANGED_FILES, recompute score/critical flag). (2) Strengthen code-reviewer-standard.md Step 2 with procedural pre-finding scope check. Testing_mode: RED.
